prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: TYPE III ANTIFREEZE PROTEIN ISOFORM HPLC 12 K61R. Entity description: PROTEIN (ANTIFREEZE PROTEIN TYPE III). Entry keywords: ANTIFREEZE PROTEIN ANTIFREEZE PROTEIN, MUTANT, ICE BINDING PROTEIN, THERMAL HYSTERESIS PROTEIN. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.515152; mean_interface=0.259782; max_segment_membrane_density=0.484316; mean_disorder=0.135476. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
